_comment: Planned-vs-implemented map for {{ project_name }}. Hand-edited as the product evolves; rendered into docs/STORYBOARD.md by storyboard.mjs on every `make storyboard`. 'shot' is a PNG the harness captures into storyboard/output/ (gitignored); null = no captured screen yet. status: done | partial | planned | changed.
